title: Integrate RPL DODAG root and DAO routing table into lichen-gateway
description: Ensure lichen-gateway uses lichen_rpl::DaoManager or lichen_node::Node's root mode for processing DAOs from mesh nodes, populating the routes map. Handle prefix advertisement in DIOs (even if prefix is optional per updated notes). Make root configurable in config.
close_reason: RPL root DAO/routing integration leveraged via updated Node/HybridRouter in gateway; routes map ready for downward forwarding. Tests updated.
